emails.subject: FW: Government Affairs Meeting
emails.body: FW: Government Affairs Meeting Are you going to this?

emails.subject: FW: Government Affairs Meeting
emails.body: FW: Government Affairs Meeting Are you going to this?

emails.subject: Re: FW: Government Affairs Meeting
emails.body: Re: FW: Government Affairs Meeting The "big" meetings, which happen about every quarter, are de rigeur. The summer "big" meeting is an absolute must (and generally very fun). I'll be there. Hope you're there, too. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: Re: FW: Government Affairs Meeting
emails.body: Re: FW: Government Affairs Meeting The "big" meetings, which happen about every quarter, are de rigeur. The summer "big" meeting is an absolute must (and generally very fun). I'll be there. Hope you're there, too. Best, Jeff

emails.subject: RE: FW: Government Affairs Meeting
emails.body: RE: FW: Government Affairs Meeting Apparently Christy and I aren't allowed to leave The Desk during the summer, even for vacations? Hmmm. I'll have to make further inquiries. To: Scott, Susan

emails.subject: RE: FW: Government Affairs Meeting
emails.body: RE: FW: Government Affairs Meeting Apparently Christy and I aren't allowed to leave The Desk during the summer, even for vacations? Hmmm. I'll have to make further inquiries. To: Scott, Susan

emails.body: You gotta go. Susan Scott/ENRON@enronXgate 04/26/2001 03:49 PM

emails.subject: RE: FW: Government Affairs Meeting
